LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED -- DEFENDANT HAROLD BRUNER'S MOTIONS TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION. MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT IS GRANTED SUBJECT TO TENANT LODGING THE RENT FOR JULY, AUGUST AND SEPT. IN THE AMOUNT $3,063 WITH LANDLORD'S ATTORNEY. $480 ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. DEFENDANT HAS 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Order Shortening Time For Hearing Of Motions To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession
Off Calendar Sep-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. of LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY, INC. 861-4444, for defendant Harold Bruner, moving to vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession
Lawrence L. Curtice, Esq., 543-5805, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANT HAROLD BRUNER'S Motions To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession. MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT IS GRANTED SUBJECT TO TENANT LODGING the rent for July, August and Sept. in the amount $3,063 WITH Landlord's ATTORNEY. $480 already paid to plaintiff's attorney. Defendant has 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
